name: cortex
_version_note: Keep this version in sync with the latest GitHub release tag (https://github.com/WynexLabs/cortex/releases). Cannot be set dynamically in JSON.
description: Long-term memory for Claude Code and Open Claw — stores notes as .md files with YAML frontmatter, syncs via GitHub, indexes via Neon Postgres. Progressive setup: works with just files, scales to full cross-machine sync.
